_comment: Manual-delete tombstones for catalog entries with NO anilist_id/mal_id. The country sweep re-deletes ID-carrying strays after every refresh, but no-ID rows are invisible to it — without this file, `npm run import -- --refresh` would resurrect them from the upstream snapshot forever. Matched by exact (title, season_year). Append an entry whenever a no-ID row is deleted by hand.

entries.title: Kan Kluai
entries.reason: Thai CG film (non-JP); deleted 2026-06-12, see db/country-sweep-report.jsonl

entries.title: Kan Kluai 2
entries.reason: Thai CG film (non-JP); deleted 2026-06-12, see db/country-sweep-report.jsonl
